---
title: "Talian Corpus"
---

<style>
.image {
  border-radius: 50%;
  min-width: 50%;
  opacity: 1;
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
  height: auto;
  transition: .5s ease;
  backface-visibility: hidden;
}

.curve { 
	width: 35%;
	max-width: 100%;
	height: auto;
	float: right;
	margin: 1.5rem;
	margin-right:1rem;
	shape-outside:circle(50%);
	-webkit-clip-path: circle(50%);
}

</style>


Thank you for your interest in our corpus!

---

<div align = "justify">

- Download <a href = "https://www.dropbox.com/s/7e1zqx1jvvhyt4c/talian.RData?dl=1">**`RData`**</a> version
- Download <a href = "https://www.dropbox.com/s/9gqzlk94tsr25xp/talian.csv?dl=1">**`csv`**</a> version

</div>

---
